prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南大学在天津市综合科类最低录取位次分别为约4641名、4761名、5123名、4969名、5379名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年累计后移约738名；2025年基准位次约5379名，较2024年后移约410名，后移幅度有所加大；该校在天津市招生计划2021年74人、2022年76人、2023年76人、2024年78人、2025年78人，2026年（招生计划文件）增至84人，较2025年扩招6人（约+7.7%），扩招幅度较为明显，理论上可缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第31–32名左右（2026年排名第31），属于中上985层次，综合实力较强；2026年高考周期声誉监测中该校未出现重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第16位（评价"高热"），短视频平台曝光度较高，反映考生关注度不低；近年无投档线断档或异常记录，声誉整体平稳偏正面；第五轮学科评估中湖南大学有8个A-及以上学科：化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-，工科与管理学科实力突出，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业在2026年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，与湖南大学优势学科高度契合，有利于提升报考热度；天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人（较2025年71938人增长约14%），考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）近年从463分升至476分，整体录取门槛略有上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5379名、2026年扩招约7.7%、天津市考生规模扩大约14%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳偏正面且抖音热度较高、优势工科专业契合当前高热专业方向等因素，判断扩招的缓解效应不足以完全抵消考生增加和热度上升带来的竞争压力，预计2026年最低录取位次在5627名基础上小幅前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低录取位次约5547名，乐观区间约5047名，保守区间约6047名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 4641, 4761, 5123, 4969, and 5379, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 738 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5379, a backward shift of about 410 positions compared to 2024, with an increased magnitude of backward shift; the enrollment plan for Hunan University in Tianjin was 74 in 2021, 76 in 2022, 76 in 2023, 78 in 2024, 78 in 2025, and increased to 84 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an expansion of 6 students (about +7.7%) compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and could theoretically alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable around 31st to 32nd in recent years (ranked 31st in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities with strong comprehensive strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no major negative public opinion was detected in reputation monitoring; the university's overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 16th (rated as 'high heat'), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting considerable attention from examinees; there have been no abnormal records of admission cutoff line breaks or anomalies in recent years, with overall reputation stable and positive; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan University has 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Computer Science and Technology A-, with outstanding strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all rated as 'high heat recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2026 major popularity analysis, highly aligned with Hunan University's advantageous disciplines, which helps boost application enthusiasm; the total number of examinees for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), with a significant expansion in examinee scale, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 463 to 476 points in recent years, with a slight increase in the overall admission threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 5379 in 2025, an enrollment expansion of about 7.7% in 2026, a 14% increase in the number of examinees in Tianjin leading to intensified competition, a stable and positive reputation with high Douyin popularity, and advantageous engineering majors aligning with current high-heat major directions, it is judged that the mitigating effect of the expansion is insufficient to fully offset the competitive pressure from increased examinees and rising popularity. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) based on 5627. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 5547, with an optimistic range of about 5047 and a conservative range of about 6047.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5547, with a range of 5047–6047. Candidates with rankings near the lower bound (5047) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Accounting, etc.); those with rankings in the middle range (around 5500) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Communication, Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper bound (around 6000) should rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options (Finance, Economics Class, Business Administration), while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.
